title: Add weekly SEO review operating docs
summary: Records release evidence for the tracked weekly Google Search Console and CTR review playbook plus the first tracker template so Tokvera can move from page production into disciplined weekly search-performance review and refresh work.
completed_todo_items: Review impressions, CTR, ranking movement, and indexed pages at the end of each week.

smoke_or_visibility.notes: Confirms the new SEO operating docs are tracked under release evidence and can be referenced in future refresh batches.

ops.rollback_plan: Delete the SEO operating docs and the release-evidence manifest if the review workflow needs to be redesigned or moved to a different planning surface.
